title: user_response
description: User's response to a clarification request. Provided when the user selects an option or supplies free-text.

selected_option.description: The id of the chosen option (e.g. 'A', 'B', 'U').

text.description: Required when selected_option is 'U'. Contains the user's free-text answer.

x-hard_rules: text is required when selected_option is 'U'
selected_option must match an id from the clarification_request options list
